channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: How DeepSeek answers questions on China differently than ChatGPT
item.description: Chinese tech startup DeepSeek ’s new artificial intelligence chatbot has sparked discussions about the competition between China and the U.S. in AI development, with many users flocking to test the rival of OpenAI‘s ChatGPT. DeepSeek’s AI assistant was the No.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Boom Supersonic’s XB-1 breaks the sound barrier—the first private aircraft to do so
item.description: About 35,000 feet (10,670 meters) over the Mojave Desert, northwest of Los Angeles, Boom Supersonic’s XB-1 became the first privately funded airplane to break the sound barrier during a test flight on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: Juniper Router Backdoor Found: Network Admins Urged to Scan for Compromise
item.description: Network administrators using Juniper Networks routers are being urged to scan for possible compromise after the discovery of a backdoor in customer routers.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: New Vatican document offers AI guidelines from warfare to health care
item.description: VATICAN CITY (AP) — A Vatican document released Tuesday offers wide-ranging ethical guidelines for the application of artificial intelligence in sectors from warfare to health care, with an underlying call that the burgeoning technology must be used as a tool to complement, and not replace, human in
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Networking terms and definitions
item.description: To find a brief definition of the networking term you are looking for user your browser’s “Find” feature then follow links to a fuller explanation. AI networking AI networking refers to the application of artificial intelligence (AI) technologies to network management and optimization.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: America’s answer to Concorde completes its first supersonic flight in a California desert
item.description: Boom Supersonic, the American company building what promises to be the world’s fastest airliner, broke the sound barrier for its first time with a test flight in Mojave.
item.dc:creator: CNN.com Wire Service, The Mercury News

item.title: Digitalización y ‘big data’ para optimizar la experiencia del turista en Toledo
item.description: El big data puede contribuir de forma eficaz a la transformación digital de la experiencia turística en las ciudades, creando patrones que permiten mejorar la gestión de los flujos de visitantes, así como los servicios que se prestan a los ciudadanos a través del análisis del dato.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: 14 cuestiones que quitan el sueño a los líderes de TI
item.description: Hoy en día, los CIO tienen muchos motivos para preocuparse: desde las antiguas preocupaciones sobre el tiempo de actividad y la disponibilidad hasta la revolución cuántica que se avecina. Por supuesto, también hay muchos otros problemas que preocupan a los CIO en este momento.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Top 8 outages of 2024
item.description: Network outages continued to plague organizations of all sizes in 2024, with major incidents exposing vulnerabilities in digital infrastructure and the growing complexity of IT environments, according to ThousandEyes’ recent Internet outage report.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Everything wrong with the AI landscape in 2025, hilariously captured in this ‘SNL’ sketch
item.description: “Isn’t AI supposed to make things simpler?” asks a student in a new Saturday Night Live sketch. Technically, the answer is yes. Artificial intelligence is often pitched as a future-forward omni-tool for removing friction from everyday tasks.
item.dc:creator: Joe Berkowitz, Fast Company

item.title: UAE leads healthcare revolution with cutting-edge AI and technology
item.description: In a groundbreaking move, the UAE is set to redefine the healthcare landscape, blending cutting-edge technology with medical innovation.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: 3 esempi che dimostrano come il CIO stia diventando un architetto dell’innovazione
item.description: Il CIO ha le potenzialità per modernizzare non solo l’IT, ma l’intera organizzazione, spezzando i silos tra le varie funzioni e diventando un architetto di innovazione a tutto campo, ovvero un manager che abbraccia con le sue conoscenze e strategie tutta l’azienda, i suoi processi e le risorse umane
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Trump says Microsoft is one of the companies eyeing TikTok
item.description: President Donald Trump said Monday evening that Microsoft is among the U.S. companies looking to take control of TikTok to help the popular app avert an effective ban that could kick-in in April.
item.dc:creator: WILL WEISSERT and HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Disabling, narrowing Apple Intelligence is just a few swipes away
item.description: A suite of artificial intelligence features is enabled automatically with Monday’s release of iOS 18.3.
item.dc:creator: Michael Ramsey, NewsNation

item.title: DeepSeek's rise spooks investors, threatens to upend AI
item.description: The rise in popularity of a high-performing and cheaply built Chinese artificial intelligence (AI) model has shaken the confidence of investors, while raising larger questions about the future of American-made AI and upping the stakes of Washington’s tech rivalry with Beijing.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: How China's DeepSeek shook up US markets, by the numbers
item.description: News from China upset U.S. markets Monday and disrupted the frenzy that had built up around artificial intelligence.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Tech stocks drop amid rise of China's DeepSeek AI model
item.description: Shares in major technology companies leading the artificial intelligence (AI) race took a tumble Monday morning amid investor concern about a new Chinese AI model with growing popularity. Nvidia, the powerhouse chipmaker fueling the AI boom, saw its shares drop 18 percent by market close Monday.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: A Pixel-inspired productivity upgrade for any Android device
item.description: My friend and fellow Android appreciator, allow me to shower you with two delightfully simultaneous truths from here in the land o’ Googley matters: I love using Google’s Pixel devices in part because of all the genuinely useful features they add into the Android equation.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: JetBrains launches AI coding agent
item.description: JetBrains has launched an AI coding agent, named Junie, with the ability to quickly solve coding tasks that otherwise could take hours, according to JetBrains.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Over 60M kids' data may have been stolen: What you need to know
item.description: More than 62 million students and 9.5 million teachers may have had their data stolen, according to a new report.
item.dc:creator: Andrew Dorn, NewsNation

item.title: Palo Alto Networks releases QRNG API framework
item.description: Cybersecurity company Palo Alto Networks has released the Quantum Random Number Generator (QRNG) Open API framework, enabling users to prepare for quantum security threats.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: 81% of firms back a Zero Trust approach to cyber defense
item.description: A recent survey of cybersecurity professionals indicates that 81% of organizations are turning to zero trust as the foundation of their cybersecurity strategies.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Tips on overcoming the loss of cherished, personal belongings in disasters
item.description: Losing important sentimental belongings — those items that represented who you are — can be traumatic for those who go through disasters that destroy homes.
item.dc:creator: JULIA RUBIN, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: How to cope when disasters strip away photos, heirlooms and other pieces of the past
item.description: They’re the possessions that tell your story: the photos of old friends and relatives. The ring your mom left you. The hand-knit Christmas stockings. Your grandfather's secretary desk and the letters inside.
item.dc:creator: JULIA RUBIN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Google BigQuery gets metadata service with Iceberg support
item.description: Google Cloud is adding a new metadata service that is compatible with Apache Iceberg to its managed data analytics service BigQuery in order to help enterprises cut down complexities around metadata management.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Pakistan's parliament passes bill with sweeping controls on social media
item.description: ISLAMABAD (AP) — Pakistan’s lower house of parliament on Thursday passed a controversial bill that will give the government sweeping controls on social media, including sending users to prison for spreading disinformation.
item.dc:creator: MUNIR AHMED, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: One Tech Tip: How to delete Facebook, Instagram and Threads if you don't like Meta's changes
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Should I stay or should I go — from Meta's social media platforms? That's what some Facebook, Instagram and Threads users are wondering after Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg's announcement this month that the company is relaxing rules on harmful content such as hate speech and abandoning its
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: This flying motorcycle can take you from traffic to sky in minutes
item.description: The Skyrider X1 from Rictor claims to be the "first amphibious flying passenger motorcycle," and it combines land and air travel in one sleek design.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Musk clashes with OpenAI CEO Sam Altman over Trump-supported Stargate AI data center project
item.description: Elon Musk is clashing with OpenAI CEO Sam Altman over the Stargate artificial intelligence infrastructure project touted by President Donald Trump, the latest in a feud between the two tech billionaires that started on OpenAI's board and is now testing Musk's influence with the new president.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Meta denies platforms are forcing users to follow Trump, Vance
item.description: "Those accounts are managed by the White House so with a new administration, the content on those Pages changes," Andy Stone wrote.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, NewsNation

item.title: Amazon to close 7 warehouses in the Canadian province of Quebec and eliminate 1,700 jobs
item.description: Online retailer Amazon said Wednesday that it's closing all seven of its warehouses in the Canadian province of Quebec in the next two months. The e-commerce giant said the move would provide “even more savings to our customers over the long run.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC
